task_objective: Refactor backend exception boundaries to narrow broad Exception catches to specific ones, ensure bare raises are used where appropriate, and check that broad exceptions are documented with a comment.
design_decisions: Narrowed catches in sdh_ludusavi/ludusavi.py to LudusaviError, KeyError, TypeError, ValueError, OSError, and/or RuntimeError.
Narrowed data parsing catches in sdh_ludusavi/service.py for cached game and status refresh parsing to KeyError, TypeError, and ValueError.
Retained intentional broad except blocks in service.py but documented each of them with an 'Intentionally broad' comment.

Added an AST static regression test in tests/test_exception_boundaries.py to enforce that no bare except: blocks exist in py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ and that every except Exception has a preceding 'Intentionally broad' comment.
Replaced 'raise exc' with a bare 'raise' in get_config_mtime_ns() to preserve the original traceback, verified by a static raise AST test.
Follow-up: Extended get_config_mtime_ns() to catch and bare-raise LudusaviError and added test coverage for it.
Follow-up: Updated get_aliases() to catch data/config-shape failures (AttributeError, KeyError, TypeError, ValueError) in addition to LudusaviError and added test coverage for it.
Follow-up: Added unit test assertions to verify that post-backup status refresh failures record a warning log as expected.
results: All 289 tests in the suite passed, code matches formatting and type checking rules.
